methodsAttempted.query: site:tcd.ie Trinity College Dublin generative AI policy students assessment academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official Centre for Academic Practice GenAI assessment page, the College Statement PDF, an academic-integrity support page, and the GenAI hub.

methodsAttempted.query: site:tcd.ie Trinity College Dublin generative AI data privacy confidential information Copilot ChatGPT guidance
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official central PDF guidance, IT Services AI guidance, library materials, and a staff SharePoint PDF link that returned HTTP 401 without authentication.

methodsAttempted.query: site:tcd.ie Trinity College Dublin generative AI research guidance artificial intelligence researcher
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official GenAI in Research page and related GenAI hub materials.

methodsAttempted.query: College Statement on Artificial Intelligence and Generative AI in Teaching, Learning, Assessment & Research
methodsAttempted.notes: The official College Statement PDF was fetched and used for central, university-level evidence.
Official GenAI hub links led to assessment, teaching and learning, research, library referencing, IT, and academic-integrity support pages.

artifacts.summary: Official Trinity College Dublin sources on tcd.ie and libguides.tcd.ie provided central GenAI statement, assessment, teaching, research, library referencing, IT security/data-protection, and academic-integrity support evidence. A school-level Languages, Literatures and Cultural Studies page was rejected for scope, and a staff ChatGPT guidelines PDF linked from IT Services returned HTTP 401 and was not used as evidence.

artifacts.title: Trinity College Dublin, The University of Dublin: AI Policy Staged Crawl Report
artifacts.summary: This staged crawl found official Trinity College Dublin sources for a central College Statement on AI/GenAI, GenAI assessment guidance, teaching and learning guidance, research guidance, Library acknowledgement/referencing guidance, IT Services AI security/data-protection guidance, and an academic-integrity page noting GenAI-related policies under development. It rejected a school-level guidance page for scope and recorded a SharePoint staff PDF as HTTP 401 inaccessible without using it as evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No claim is marked human_reviewed or canonical; all approved claims remain staged agent-reviewed candidates.
The staff ChatGPT guidelines PDF linked from IT Services returned HTTP 401 and was recorded as inaccessible without authentication attempts.
School-specific Languages, Literatures and Cultural Studies GenAI guidance was rejected for university-wide claims because central sources were available.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
